channel.title: Fmis on Pi Stack
channel.description: Recent content in Fmis on Pi Stack

item.title: farmOS vs Ekylibre: Best Open-Source Farm Management Systems 2026
item.description: Managing a modern farm means tracking field operations, crop rotations, equipment maintenance, livestock records, harvest yields, and regulatory compliance — often across dozens of hectares. Commercial farm management software (FMIS) typically charges per-acre or per-user pricing, locks your data behind proprietary APIs, and requires an internet connection to access your own records.
